seed_problem: Select a maximum-weight set of mutually non-conflicting research sites on a general conflict graph; checker validates independence and scores weight/baseline.
mutation: input: generalize the conflict graph from a nice (bipartite/structured) class to an arbitrary general graph with planted cliques and heavy-tailed vertex weights, so maximum-weight independent set is NP-hard and weight-greedy / weight-over-degree / randomized-restart / local-search strategies diverge.
title: Arena Showcase Lineup: Rivalry-Free Roster
strategies: single-star baseline: feature only the highest-hype performer (always feasible; equals the checker baseline B)
weight-greedy: sort performers by hype descending and add each one whose addition keeps the roster rivalry-free
weight-over-degree greedy (GWMIN): repeatedly pick the remaining performer maximizing hype/(1+current-conflict-degree), feature it, and drop it and its rivals
randomized multi-restart with local-search fill: perturb greedy orders across seeded restarts, then greedily add any still-addable performer, and keep the highest-hype rivalry-free roster found
